description: French-Canadian outlaw motorcycle club and criminal organization based in Quebec, founded in 1965 by Michel Langlois, Roger Calve, Yvon Bilodeau, and others. At their peak, they were the second-largest biker gang in Canada, known for drug trafficking, extortion, and violence. In 1977, they were absorbed by the Hells Angels and became the first Canadian Hells Angels charter.
